description: Fixed audit set for on-chain vs off-chain embedding fidelity test. 80 sentences: 40 FR, 40 EN, covering 8 domains + edge cases.
usage: Encode all sentences both off-chain (Q4_0 GGUF) and on-chain (ICP canister). Compare cosine similarity, rank correlation, retrieval agreement.
